channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report Suggests Trump Weighing Emissions Pardons and Other Clemency Requests
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to issue new pardons Friday for federal emissions-related offenses, according to reports.

item.title: 5th Circuit Rules Against Trump DOJ on Mandatory Immigration Detention
Trump's Storytime Session Becomes a Presidential Roast
item.description: President Donald Trump joined second lady Usha Vance on her podcast, where he read children's books and made off-script remarks.

item.title: Bruce Blakeman to Newsmax: Democratic Socialists Hate America
item.description: Nassau County Executive Bruce Blakeman, the Republican nominee for New York governor, urged voters to turn out in an interview with Newsmax.
